name: agentic-ai-cartography
description: MCP-first infrastructure & agentic-AI cartography — read-only discovery of your system landscape exposed as MCP resources, tools and prompts.
long_description: Cartography discovers your services, databases, SaaS tools and their dependencies (read-only, deterministic) and exposes the topology over the Model Context Protocol. This bundle launches the published npm server via npx; run a discovery first with `datasynx-cartography discover`.

tools.name: get_summary
tools.description: Low-token overview of the whole landscape.

tools.name: list_services
tools.description: List discovered services or data stores.

tools.name: get_node
tools.description: Fetch a single node with its incident edges.
